titleStmt.title: SII 4.1098: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 1098. (A.R. No. 246 of 1893). ON THE SAME WALL; BETWEEN THE SIXTH AND SEVENTH PILLARS.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
vallabhastatsu yaikābhūdvimala
pāhvaya śśākābdēśaraśailakhēṁdugaṇitē puṇyē śaśāṁkagrahē [. 1*] Utsavē bhīmanāthasya śrīvīthimaṭhamadhyataḥ . tapasvibhyōnnadānārtthamā
caṁdrārkkanniraṁtaraṁ [. 2*] kruṁduṭigrāmasammaṁddhi kṣētraṁ tṛṁśatkhaṇḍikaṁ prādāttadakarīkṛtya sōyaṁ bhīmamahīpatiḥ [. 3*]gāmēkāṁ ratnikāmēkāṁ bhūmāvapyē
kamaṁgulaṁ harannarakamāpnōti yāvadābhūtasaṁplavaṁ [. 4*] bahubhirvvasudhā dattā bahubhiścānupālittā. yesya yesya yadā bhūmi stasya tasya tadā
phalaṁ [. 5*] svastiśrī śakavarṣaṁbulu 1075 gunēṁṭi śrīrājarājadēvara vijayarājyasaṁ vatsa 9 śrāhi dakṣiṇāyanasaṁkrāṁti nimittamuna śrīmanmahā
maṇḍalēśvarakōna satyarājula koḍku bhīmarāju śrīdākṣārāmamuna śrībhīmēśvaramahādēvara tiruvīdhimaṭhamuna tapassulaku śrībhīmēśvarama
hādēvara vivāhçōtsavamu nannidinamulakuṁ diruvīdhi tapassulakuṁ bhōjanārtthamunaku
veṭṭiṁppulakuṁgā guddavādināṇṭi kruṁddūṭi polamunaṁdu sattyairā
ju yiccina tōṁṭṭapaṛṟulōpaina nēla khaṇḍuvulu Ēnu vīri koḍku bhīmarāju Ī yūri pāḍulōpugā teṟa[I]liyaiyina bhūmi yiccina nēla kaṇḍuvulu
muppadiṁggā berasi khaṇḍuvulu muppaḍēnu Aṁttarāyamulōpaina samastāyamulu viḍici sarvvakāraparihāramugā Ācaṁdrārkkamunaku dharmmuvugā
niccina nēla khaṇḍuvulu 35 ṇṭiki likhiṁta sūrācāryyēṇa .
Digital edition of SII 4.1098 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
